name: Optimize Tartalo codegen performance and generated code quality

description: Baseline measurement of current codegen performance

asi.hypothesis: Establish baseline metrics before any optimizations

description: Optimize codegen: fast itoa, concatPrologues, writeLine byte writes, escapeForDoubleQuoted prealloc

asi.hypothesis: Reduce allocations in hot paths: replace fmt.Sprintf in tmp() with string concat+fast itoa, use WriteByte instead of WriteString for indentation, preallocate escapeForDoubleQuoted builder, and add concatPrologues to avoid double-slice allocation

description: Re-baseline after reverting needsArgv (no code change)

asi.hypothesis: Re-baseline to confirm metrics after revert
asi.rollback_reason: No code change - just confirming baseline variance is ~100-200ns

description: Remove discard comments and no-op expr stmts to shrink output and reduce codegen work

asi.hypothesis: Eliminating unnecessary comment lines for discarded values reduces strings.Builder work and output size

description: Optimize len() for simple string vars: skip temp, use ${#name} directly

asi.hypothesis: For len(stringVar) we can emit ${#name} directly instead of copying to a temp first, reducing generated code size and runtime overhead
